channel.title: Training on HH Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Training on HH Blog

item.title: AI 日报 | 2026-03-19
item.description:
AI 日报 | 2026年03月19日（星期四）

📅 日期：2026年03月19日 | 📊 今日收录：15 篇论文 | 🔬 重点领域：LLM、Agent、Robotics | 🚀 大模型应用：15 项

📌 今日总结

  • When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making (LLM): Embodied robotic systems increasingly rely on large language model (LLM)-based agents to support high-level reasoning, p…
  • Kestrel (Agent): Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have become increasingly strong but remain prone to hallucinations in multimodal ta…
  • Omanic (LLM): Reasoning-focused large language models (LLMs) have advanced in many NLP tasks, yet their evaluation remains challenging…
  • Differential Harm Propensity in Personalized LLM Agents (LLM): Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as tool-using agents, shifting safety concerns from harmful text …
  • Chronos (LLM): Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled conversational AI agents to engage in extended multi-turn i…

🚀 大模型应用亮点

When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning

Embodied robotic systems increasingly rely on large language model (LLM)-based agents to support high-level reasoning, planning, and decision-making during interactions with the environment. However, invoking LLM reasoning introduces substantial computational latency and resource overhead, which can…

Kestrel: Grounding Self-Refinement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, RAG

Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have become increasingly strong but remain prone to hallucinations in multimodal tasks, which significantly narrows their deployment. As training these LVLMs to avoid hallucinations becomes prohibitively expensive for larger models, training-free methods offer a …

Omanic: Towards Step-wise Evaluation of Multi-hop Reasoning in Large Language Models

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation

Reasoning-focused large language models (LLMs) have advanced in many NLP tasks, yet their evaluation remains challenging: final answers alone do not expose the intermediate reasoning steps, making it difficult to determine whether a model truly reasons correctly and where failures occur, while exist…

📚 论文一览

# 论文 第一作者 领域
1 When Should a Robot Think? Resource… Unknown LLM, Agent, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning
2 Kestrel: Grounding Self-Refinement … Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, RAG
3 Omanic: Towards Step-wise Evaluatio… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation
4 Differential Harm Propensity in Per… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, RAG, Memory
5 Chronos: Temporal-Aware Conversatio… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Memory
6 Rationale Matters: Learning Transfe… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Training, Web Agent, Alignment, Code Generation
7 Segmentation-Based Attention Entrop… Unknown Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, RAG
8 DreamPlan: Efficient Reinforcement … Unknown Multimodal, Robotics, Training, Reasoning, RAG
9 Scalable Inspection Planning via Fl… Unknown Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Memory, Medical AI, Code Generation
10 IQuest-Coder-V1 Technical Report Unknown LLM, Agent, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation
11 Surg$Σ$: A Spectrum of Large-Scale … Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Reasoning, Web Agent, Medical AI
12 Efficient Reasoning on the Edge Unknown LLM, Reasoning, Memory
13 Anticipatory Planning for Multimoda… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning
14 InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model … Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation
15 IOSVLM: A 3D Vision-Language Model … Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Training, Web Agent, RAG, Alignment, Code Generation

🔍 详细介绍

论文1: When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making

arXiv:2603.16673v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning

摘要: Embodied robotic systems increasingly rely on large language model (LLM)-based agents to support high-level reasoning, planning, and decision-making during interactions with the environment. However, invoking LLM reasoning introduces substantial computational latency and resource overhead, which can interrupt action execution and reduce system reliability. Excessive reasoning may delay actions, wh…

论文2: Kestrel: Grounding Self-Refinement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation

arXiv:2603.16664v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, RAG

摘要: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have become increasingly strong but remain prone to hallucinations in multimodal tasks, which significantly narrows their deployment. As training these LVLMs to avoid hallucinations becomes prohibitively expensive for larger models, training-free methods offer a cheap and flexible solution to this problem, yet existing approaches based on decoding or tool use o…

论文3: Omanic: Towards Step-wise Evaluation of Multi-hop Reasoning in Large Language Models

arXiv:2603.16654v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Reasoning-focused large language models (LLMs) have advanced in many NLP tasks, yet their evaluation remains challenging: final answers alone do not expose the intermediate reasoning steps, making it difficult to determine whether a model truly reasons correctly and where failures occur, while existing multi-hop QA benchmarks lack step-level annotations for diagnosing reasoning failures. To addres…

论文4: Differential Harm Propensity in Personalized LLM Agents: The Curious Case of Mental Health Disclosure

arXiv:2603.16734v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, RAG, Memory

摘要: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as tool-using agents, shifting safety concerns from harmful text generation to harmful task completion. Deployed systems often condition on user profiles or persistent memory, yet agent safety evaluations typically ignore personalization signals. To address this gap, we investigated how mental health disclosure, a sensitive and realistic user-…

论文5: Chronos: Temporal-Aware Conversational Agents with Structured Event Retrieval for Long-Term Memory

arXiv:2603.16862v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Memory

摘要: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled conversational AI agents to engage in extended multi-turn interactions spanning weeks or months. However, existing memory systems struggle to reason over temporally grounded facts and preferences that evolve across months of interaction and lack effective retrieval strategies for multi-hop, time-sensitive queries over long dialogue histo…

论文6: Rationale Matters: Learning Transferable Rubrics via Proxy-Guided Critique for VLMReward Models

arXiv:2603.16600v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Training, Web Agent, Alignment, Code Generation

摘要: Generative reward models (GRMs) for vision-language models (VLMs) often evaluate outputs via a three-stage pipeline: rubric generation, criterion-based scoring, and a final verdict. However, the intermediate rubric is rarely optimized directly. Prior work typically either treats rubrics as incidental or relies on expensive LLM-as-judge checks that provide no differentiable signal and limited train…

论文7: Segmentation-Based Attention Entropy: Detecting and Mitigating Object Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models

arXiv:2603.16558v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on many multimodal tasks, but object hallucinations severely undermine their reliability. Most existing studies focus on the text modality, attributing hallucinations to overly strong language priors and insufficient visual grounding. In contrast, we observe that abnormal attention patterns within the visual modality can also give ris…

论文8: DreamPlan: Efficient Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Planners via Video World Models

arXiv:2603.16860v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Multimodal, Robotics, Training, Reasoning, RAG

摘要: Robotic manipulation requires sophisticated commonsense reasoning, a capability naturally possessed by large-scale Vision-Language Models (VLMs). While VLMs show promise as zero-shot planners, their lack of grounded physical understanding often leads to compounding errors and low success rates when deployed in complex real-world environments, particularly for challenging tasks like deformable obje…

论文9: Scalable Inspection Planning via Flow-based Mixed Integer Linear Programming

arXiv:2603.16593v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Memory, Medical AI, Code Generation

摘要: Inspection planning is concerned with computing the shortest robot path to inspect a given set of points of interest (POIs) using the robot’s sensors. This problem arises in a wide range of applications from manufacturing to medical robotics. To alleviate the problem’s complexity, recent methods rely on sampling-based methods to obtain a more manageable (discrete) graph inspection planning (GIP) p…

论文10: IQuest-Coder-V1 Technical Report

arXiv:2603.16733v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation

摘要: In this report, we introduce the IQuest-Coder-V1 series-(7B/14B/40B/40B-Loop), a new family of code large language models (LLMs). Moving beyond static code representations, we propose the code-flow multi-stage training paradigm, which captures the dynamic evolution of software logic through different phases of the pipeline. Our models are developed through the evolutionary pipeline, starting with …

论文11: Surg$Σ$: A Spectrum of Large-Scale Multimodal Data and Foundation Models for Surgical Intelligence

arXiv:2603.16822v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Reasoning, Web Agent, Medical AI

摘要: Surgical intelligence has the potential to improve the safety and consistency of surgical care, yet most existing surgical AI frameworks remain task-specific and struggle to generalize across procedures and institutions. Although multimodal foundation models, particularly multimodal large language models, have demonstrated strong cross-task capabilities across various medical domains, their advanc…

论文12: Efficient Reasoning on the Edge

arXiv:2603.16867v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Reasoning, Memory

摘要: Large language models (LLMs) with chain-of-thought reasoning achieve state-of-the-art performance across complex problem-solving tasks, but their verbose reasoning traces and large context requirements make them impractical for edge deployment. These challenges include high token generation costs, large KV-cache footprints, and inefficiencies when distilling reasoning capabilities into smaller mod…

论文13: Anticipatory Planning for Multimodal AI Agents

arXiv:2603.16777v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning

摘要: Recent advances in multimodal agents have improved computer-use interaction and tool-usage, yet most existing systems remain reactive, optimizing actions in isolation without reasoning about future states or long-term goals. This limits planning coherence and prevents agents from reliably solving high-level, multi-step tasks. We introduce TraceR1, a two-stage reinforcement learning framework that …

论文14: InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios

arXiv:2603.16790v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation

摘要: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks. Nevertheless, their performance degrades significantly in industrial scenarios that require reasoning about hardware semantics, specialized language constructs, and strict resource constraints. To address these challenges, we introduce InCoder-32B (Industrial-Coder-32B), the first 32B-parameter code f…

论文15: IOSVLM: A 3D Vision-Language Model for Unified Dental Diagnosis from Intraoral Scans

arXiv:2603.16781v1 | | 2026-03-17

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Training, Web Agent, RAG, Alignment, Code Generation

摘要: 3D intraoral scans (IOS) are increasingly adopted in routine dentistry due to abundant geometric evidence, and unified multi-disease diagnosis is desirable for clinical documentation and communication. While recent works introduce dental vision-language models (VLMs) to enable unified diagnosis and report generation on 2D images or multi-view images rendered from IOS, they do not fully leverage na…

🏢 行业快报

  • OpenAI 发布新模型更新: OpenAI 持续优化 GPT 系列模型，提升推理能力和多模态理解性能。 (OpenAI Blog)
  • Anthropic Claude 功能增强: Claude 系列模型新增长上下文支持和改进的代码能力。 (Anthropic)
  • Google DeepMind 研究进展: DeepMind 在多模态学习和机器人控制领域取得新的突破。 (Google DeepMind)

📖 全部参考链接

  1. When Should a Robot Think? Resource-Aware Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning for Embodied Robotic Decision-Making
  2. Kestrel: Grounding Self-Refinement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation
  3. Omanic: Towards Step-wise Evaluation of Multi-hop Reasoning in Large Language Models
  4. Differential Harm Propensity in Personalized LLM Agents: The Curious Case of Mental Health Disclosure
  5. Chronos: Temporal-Aware Conversational Agents with Structured Event Retrieval for Long-Term Memory
  6. Rationale Matters: Learning Transferable Rubrics via Proxy-Guided Critique for VLMReward Models
  7. Segmentation-Based Attention Entropy: Detecting and Mitigating Object Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models
  8. DreamPlan: Efficient Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Planners via Video World Models
  9. Scalable Inspection Planning via Flow-based Mixed Integer Linear Programming
  10. IQuest-Coder-V1 Technical Report
  11. Surg$Σ$: A Spectrum of Large-Scale Multimodal Data and Foundation Models for Surgical Intelligence
  12. Efficient Reasoning on the Edge
  13. Anticipatory Planning for Multimodal AI Agents
  14. InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios
  15. IOSVLM: A 3D Vision-Language Model for Unified Dental Diagnosis from Intraoral Scans

📬 AI 日报自动抓取自 arXiv，每日早 8 点更新

💬 重点聚焦：大模型、Agent、多模态、机器人等方向

📊 统计：今日共收录 15 篇论文，其中大模型应用 15 项

item.title: AI 日报 | 2026-03-16
item.description:
AI 日报 | 2026年03月16日（星期一）

📅 日期：2026年03月16日 | 📊 今日收录：15 篇论文 | 🔬 重点领域：LLM、Agent、Multimodal | 🚀 大模型应用：15 项

📌 今日总结

  • LABSHIELD (LLM): Artificial intelligence is increasingly catalyzing scientific automation, with multimodal large language model (MLLM) ag…
  • OmniStream (Agent): Modern visual agents require representations that are general, causal, and physically structured to operate in real-time…
  • MobileKernelBench (LLM): Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation, yet their potential for gener…
  • EgoIntent (LLM): Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable video reasoning capabilities across diverse tasks….
  • HomeSafe-Bench (Agent): The rapid evolution of embodied agents has accelerated the deployment of household robots in real-world environments. Ho…

🚀 大模型应用亮点

LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark for Safety-Critical Reasoning and Planning in Scientific Laboratories

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG

Artificial intelligence is increasingly catalyzing scientific automation, with multimodal large language model (MLLM) agents evolving from lab assistants into self-driving lab operators. This transition imposes stringent safety requirements on laboratory environments, where fragile glassware, hazard…

OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment

Modern visual agents require representations that are general, causal, and physically structured to operate in real-time streaming environments. However, current vision foundation models remain fragmented, specializing narrowly in image semantic perception, offline temporal modeling, or spatial geom…

MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation

Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation, yet their potential for generating kernels specifically for mobile de- vices remains largely unexplored. In this work, we extend the scope of automated kernel generation to the mobile domain to investigate the…

📚 论文一览

# 论文 第一作者 领域
1 LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark f… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG
2 OmniStream: Mastering Perception, R… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment
3 MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write E… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation
4 EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
5 HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-L… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning
6 EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-o… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Code Generation
7 SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback A… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment, Code Generation
8 HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Syn… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, Alignment
9 MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Ve… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent
10 Strategic Navigation or Stochastic … Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
11 XSkill: Continual Learning from Exp… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
12 CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Per… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning
13 Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation
14 BTZSC: A Benchmark for Zero-Shot Te… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, RAG, Code Generation
15 Sparking Scientific Creativity via … Unknown LLM, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

🔍 详细介绍

论文1: LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark for Safety-Critical Reasoning and Planning in Scientific Laboratories

arXiv:2603.11987v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG

摘要: Artificial intelligence is increasingly catalyzing scientific automation, with multimodal large language model (MLLM) agents evolving from lab assistants into self-driving lab operators. This transition imposes stringent safety requirements on laboratory environments, where fragile glassware, hazardous substances, and high-precision laboratory equipment render planning errors or misinterpreted ris…

论文2: OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams

arXiv:2603.12265v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment

摘要: Modern visual agents require representations that are general, causal, and physically structured to operate in real-time streaming environments. However, current vision foundation models remain fragmented, specializing narrowly in image semantic perception, offline temporal modeling, or spatial geometry. This paper introduces OmniStream, a unified streaming visual backbone that effectively perceiv…

论文3: MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?

arXiv:2603.11935v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation, yet their potential for generating kernels specifically for mobile de- vices remains largely unexplored. In this work, we extend the scope of automated kernel generation to the mobile domain to investigate the central question: Can LLMs write efficient kernels for mobile devices? To enable systematic investi…

论文4: EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level Benchmark for Understanding What, Why, and Next

arXiv:2603.12147v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable video reasoning capabilities across diverse tasks. However, their ability to understand human intent at a fine-grained level in egocentric videos remains largely unexplored. Existing benchmarks focus primarily on episode-level intent reasoning, overlooking the finer granularity of step-level intent understanding. Yet application…

论文5: HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Unsafe Action Detection for Embodied Agents in Household Scenarios

arXiv:2603.11975v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning

摘要: The rapid evolution of embodied agents has accelerated the deployment of household robots in real-world environments. However, unlike structured industrial settings, household spaces introduce unpredictable safety risks, where system limitations such as perception latency and lack of common sense knowledge can lead to dangerous errors. Current safety evaluations, often restricted to static images,…

论文6: EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Diffusion Models

arXiv:2603.12252v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Recently, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have been widely integrated into diffusion frameworks primarily as text encoders to tackle complex tasks such as spatial reasoning. However, this paradigm suffers from two critical limitations: (i) MLLMs text encoder exhibits insufficient reasoning depth. Single-step encoding fails to activate the Chain-of-Thought process, which is essential for M…

论文7: SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback Agent for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Generation

arXiv:2603.12238v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment, Code Generation

摘要: Text-to-3D scene generation from natural language is highly desirable for digital content creation. However, existing methods are largely domain-restricted or reliant on predefined spatial relationships, limiting their capacity for unconstrained, open-vocabulary 3D scene synthesis. In this paper, we introduce SceneAssistant, a visual-feedback-driven agent designed for open-vocabulary 3D scene gene…

论文8: HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis for GUI Agents

arXiv:2603.12138v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, Alignment

摘要: Graphical user interface (GUI) agents powered by large vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable potential in automating digital tasks, highlighting the need for high-quality trajectory data to support effective agent training. Yet existing trajectory synthesis pipelines often yield agents that fail to generalize beyond simple interactions. We identify this limitation as stemming from th…

论文9: MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Verified Benchmark for Visually Grounded Deep Compositional Reasoning

arXiv:2603.12266v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent

摘要: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to carry out visual workflows such as navigating GUIs, where the next step depends on verified visual compositional conditions (e.g., “if a permission dialog appears and the color of the interface is green, click Allow”) and the process may branch or terminate early. Yet this capability remains under-evaluated: existing benchmarks focu…

论文10: Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections

arXiv:2603.12180v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Multimodal agents offer a promising path to automating complex document-intensive workflows. Yet, a critical question remains: do these agents demonstrate genuine strategic reasoning, or merely stochastic trial-and-error search? To address this, we introduce MADQA, a benchmark of 2,250 human-authored questions grounded in 800 heterogeneous PDF documents. Guided by Classical Test Theory, we design …

论文11: XSkill: Continual Learning from Experience and Skills in Multimodal Agents

arXiv:2603.12056v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Multimodal agents can now tackle complex reasoning tasks with diverse tools, yet they still suffer from inefficient tool use and inflexible orchestration in open-ended settings. A central challenge is enabling such agents to continually improve without parameter updates by learning from past trajectories. We identify two complementary forms of reusable knowledge essential for this goal: experience…

论文12: CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Perform Theory of Mind Tasks?

arXiv:2603.11915v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning

摘要: Theory of Mind (ToM)-the ability to reason about the mental states of oneself and others-is a cornerstone of human social intelligence. As Large Language Models (LLMs) become ubiquitous in real-world applications, validating their capacity for this level of social reasoning is essential for effective and natural interactions. However, existing benchmarks for assessing ToM in LLMs are limited; most…

论文13: Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs Can Watch and Think Simultaneously

arXiv:2603.12262v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation

摘要: Online Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) play a critical role in supporting responsive, real-time interaction. Existing methods focus on streaming perception, lacking a synchronized logical reasoning stream. However, directly applying test-time scaling methods incurs unacceptable response latency. To address this trade-off, we propose Video Streaming Thinking (VST), a novel paradigm for stre…

论文14: BTZSC: A Benchmark for Zero-Shot Text Classification Across Cross-Encoders, Embedding Models, Rerankers and LLMs

arXiv:2603.11991v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Zero-shot text classification (ZSC) offers the promise of eliminating costly task-specific annotation by matching texts directly to human-readable label descriptions. While early approaches have predominantly relied on cross-encoder models fine-tuned for natural language inference (NLI), recent advances in text-embedding models, rerankers, and instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) have ch…

论文15: Sparking Scientific Creativity via LLM-Driven Interdisciplinary Inspiration

arXiv:2603.12226v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Despite interdisciplinary research leading to larger and longer-term impact, most work remains confined to single-domain academic silos. Recent AI-based approaches to scientific discovery show promise for interdisciplinary research, but many prioritize rapidly designing experiments and solutions, bypassing the exploratory, collaborative reasoning processes that drive creative interdisciplinary bre…

🏢 行业快报

  • OpenAI 发布新模型更新: OpenAI 持续优化 GPT 系列模型，提升推理能力和多模态理解性能。 (OpenAI Blog)
  • Anthropic Claude 功能增强: Claude 系列模型新增长上下文支持和改进的代码能力。 (Anthropic)
  • Google DeepMind 研究进展: DeepMind 在多模态学习和机器人控制领域取得新的突破。 (Google DeepMind)

📖 全部参考链接

  1. LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark for Safety-Critical Reasoning and Planning in Scientific Laboratories
  2. OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams
  3. MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?
  4. EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level Benchmark for Understanding What, Why, and Next
  5. HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Unsafe Action Detection for Embodied Agents in Household Scenarios
  6. EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Diffusion Models
  7. SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback Agent for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Generation
  8. HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis for GUI Agents
  9. MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Verified Benchmark for Visually Grounded Deep Compositional Reasoning
  10. Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections
  11. XSkill: Continual Learning from Experience and Skills in Multimodal Agents
  12. CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Perform Theory of Mind Tasks?
  13. Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs Can Watch and Think Simultaneously
  14. BTZSC: A Benchmark for Zero-Shot Text Classification Across Cross-Encoders, Embedding Models, Rerankers and LLMs
  15. Sparking Scientific Creativity via LLM-Driven Interdisciplinary Inspiration

📬 AI 日报自动抓取自 arXiv，每日早 8 点更新

💬 重点聚焦：大模型、Agent、多模态、机器人等方向

📊 统计：今日共收录 15 篇论文，其中大模型应用 15 项

item.title: AI 日报 | 2026-03-15
item.description:
AI 日报 | 2026年03月15日（星期日）

📅 日期：2026年03月15日 | 📊 今日收录：15 篇论文 | 🔬 重点领域：LLM、Agent、Multimodal | 🚀 大模型应用：15 项

📌 今日总结

  • LABSHIELD (LLM): Artificial intelligence is increasingly catalyzing scientific automation, with multimodal large language model (MLLM) ag…
  • OmniStream (Agent): Modern visual agents require representations that are general, causal, and physically structured to operate in real-time…
  • MobileKernelBench (LLM): Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation, yet their potential for gener…
  • EgoIntent (LLM): Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable video reasoning capabilities across diverse tasks….
  • HomeSafe-Bench (Agent): The rapid evolution of embodied agents has accelerated the deployment of household robots in real-world environments. Ho…

🚀 大模型应用亮点

LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark for Safety-Critical Reasoning and Planning in Scientific Laboratories

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG

Artificial intelligence is increasingly catalyzing scientific automation, with multimodal large language model (MLLM) agents evolving from lab assistants into self-driving lab operators. This transition imposes stringent safety requirements on laboratory environments, where fragile glassware, hazard…

OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment

Modern visual agents require representations that are general, causal, and physically structured to operate in real-time streaming environments. However, current vision foundation models remain fragmented, specializing narrowly in image semantic perception, offline temporal modeling, or spatial geom…

MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation

Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation, yet their potential for generating kernels specifically for mobile de- vices remains largely unexplored. In this work, we extend the scope of automated kernel generation to the mobile domain to investigate the…

📚 论文一览

# 论文 第一作者 领域
1 LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark f… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG
2 OmniStream: Mastering Perception, R… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment
3 MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write E… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation
4 EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
5 HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-L… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning
6 EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-o… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Code Generation
7 SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback A… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment, Code Generation
8 HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Syn… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, Alignment
9 MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Ve… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent
10 Strategic Navigation or Stochastic … Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
11 XSkill: Continual Learning from Exp… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
12 CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Per… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning
13 Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation
14 BTZSC: A Benchmark for Zero-Shot Te… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, RAG, Code Generation
15 Sparking Scientific Creativity via … Unknown LLM, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

🔍 详细介绍

论文1: LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark for Safety-Critical Reasoning and Planning in Scientific Laboratories

arXiv:2603.11987v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG

摘要: Artificial intelligence is increasingly catalyzing scientific automation, with multimodal large language model (MLLM) agents evolving from lab assistants into self-driving lab operators. This transition imposes stringent safety requirements on laboratory environments, where fragile glassware, hazardous substances, and high-precision laboratory equipment render planning errors or misinterpreted ris…

论文2: OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams

arXiv:2603.12265v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment

摘要: Modern visual agents require representations that are general, causal, and physically structured to operate in real-time streaming environments. However, current vision foundation models remain fragmented, specializing narrowly in image semantic perception, offline temporal modeling, or spatial geometry. This paper introduces OmniStream, a unified streaming visual backbone that effectively perceiv…

论文3: MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?

arXiv:2603.11935v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code generation, yet their potential for generating kernels specifically for mobile de- vices remains largely unexplored. In this work, we extend the scope of automated kernel generation to the mobile domain to investigate the central question: Can LLMs write efficient kernels for mobile devices? To enable systematic investi…

论文4: EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level Benchmark for Understanding What, Why, and Next

arXiv:2603.12147v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable video reasoning capabilities across diverse tasks. However, their ability to understand human intent at a fine-grained level in egocentric videos remains largely unexplored. Existing benchmarks focus primarily on episode-level intent reasoning, overlooking the finer granularity of step-level intent understanding. Yet application…

论文5: HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Unsafe Action Detection for Embodied Agents in Household Scenarios

arXiv:2603.11975v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning

摘要: The rapid evolution of embodied agents has accelerated the deployment of household robots in real-world environments. However, unlike structured industrial settings, household spaces introduce unpredictable safety risks, where system limitations such as perception latency and lack of common sense knowledge can lead to dangerous errors. Current safety evaluations, often restricted to static images,…

论文6: EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Diffusion Models

arXiv:2603.12252v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Recently, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have been widely integrated into diffusion frameworks primarily as text encoders to tackle complex tasks such as spatial reasoning. However, this paradigm suffers from two critical limitations: (i) MLLMs text encoder exhibits insufficient reasoning depth. Single-step encoding fails to activate the Chain-of-Thought process, which is essential for M…

论文7: SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback Agent for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Generation

arXiv:2603.12238v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment, Code Generation

摘要: Text-to-3D scene generation from natural language is highly desirable for digital content creation. However, existing methods are largely domain-restricted or reliant on predefined spatial relationships, limiting their capacity for unconstrained, open-vocabulary 3D scene synthesis. In this paper, we introduce SceneAssistant, a visual-feedback-driven agent designed for open-vocabulary 3D scene gene…

论文8: HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis for GUI Agents

arXiv:2603.12138v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, Alignment

摘要: Graphical user interface (GUI) agents powered by large vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable potential in automating digital tasks, highlighting the need for high-quality trajectory data to support effective agent training. Yet existing trajectory synthesis pipelines often yield agents that fail to generalize beyond simple interactions. We identify this limitation as stemming from th…

论文9: MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Verified Benchmark for Visually Grounded Deep Compositional Reasoning

arXiv:2603.12266v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent

摘要: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to carry out visual workflows such as navigating GUIs, where the next step depends on verified visual compositional conditions (e.g., “if a permission dialog appears and the color of the interface is green, click Allow”) and the process may branch or terminate early. Yet this capability remains under-evaluated: existing benchmarks focu…

论文10: Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections

arXiv:2603.12180v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Multimodal agents offer a promising path to automating complex document-intensive workflows. Yet, a critical question remains: do these agents demonstrate genuine strategic reasoning, or merely stochastic trial-and-error search? To address this, we introduce MADQA, a benchmark of 2,250 human-authored questions grounded in 800 heterogeneous PDF documents. Guided by Classical Test Theory, we design …

论文11: XSkill: Continual Learning from Experience and Skills in Multimodal Agents

arXiv:2603.12056v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Multimodal agents can now tackle complex reasoning tasks with diverse tools, yet they still suffer from inefficient tool use and inflexible orchestration in open-ended settings. A central challenge is enabling such agents to continually improve without parameter updates by learning from past trajectories. We identify two complementary forms of reusable knowledge essential for this goal: experience…

论文12: CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Perform Theory of Mind Tasks?

arXiv:2603.11915v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning

摘要: Theory of Mind (ToM)-the ability to reason about the mental states of oneself and others-is a cornerstone of human social intelligence. As Large Language Models (LLMs) become ubiquitous in real-world applications, validating their capacity for this level of social reasoning is essential for effective and natural interactions. However, existing benchmarks for assessing ToM in LLMs are limited; most…

论文13: Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs Can Watch and Think Simultaneously

arXiv:2603.12262v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation

摘要: Online Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) play a critical role in supporting responsive, real-time interaction. Existing methods focus on streaming perception, lacking a synchronized logical reasoning stream. However, directly applying test-time scaling methods incurs unacceptable response latency. To address this trade-off, we propose Video Streaming Thinking (VST), a novel paradigm for stre…

论文14: BTZSC: A Benchmark for Zero-Shot Text Classification Across Cross-Encoders, Embedding Models, Rerankers and LLMs

arXiv:2603.11991v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, RAG, Code Generation

摘要: Zero-shot text classification (ZSC) offers the promise of eliminating costly task-specific annotation by matching texts directly to human-readable label descriptions. While early approaches have predominantly relied on cross-encoder models fine-tuned for natural language inference (NLI), recent advances in text-embedding models, rerankers, and instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) have ch…

论文15: Sparking Scientific Creativity via LLM-Driven Interdisciplinary Inspiration

arXiv:2603.12226v1 | | 2026-03-12

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Despite interdisciplinary research leading to larger and longer-term impact, most work remains confined to single-domain academic silos. Recent AI-based approaches to scientific discovery show promise for interdisciplinary research, but many prioritize rapidly designing experiments and solutions, bypassing the exploratory, collaborative reasoning processes that drive creative interdisciplinary bre…

🏢 行业快报

  • OpenAI 发布新模型更新: OpenAI 持续优化 GPT 系列模型，提升推理能力和多模态理解性能。 (OpenAI Blog)
  • Anthropic Claude 功能增强: Claude 系列模型新增长上下文支持和改进的代码能力。 (Anthropic)
  • Google DeepMind 研究进展: DeepMind 在多模态学习和机器人控制领域取得新的突破。 (Google DeepMind)

📖 全部参考链接

  1. LABSHIELD: A Multimodal Benchmark for Safety-Critical Reasoning and Planning in Scientific Laboratories
  2. OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams
  3. MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?
  4. EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level Benchmark for Understanding What, Why, and Next
  5. HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Unsafe Action Detection for Embodied Agents in Household Scenarios
  6. EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Diffusion Models
  7. SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback Agent for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Generation
  8. HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis for GUI Agents
  9. MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Verified Benchmark for Visually Grounded Deep Compositional Reasoning
  10. Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections
  11. XSkill: Continual Learning from Experience and Skills in Multimodal Agents
  12. CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Perform Theory of Mind Tasks?
  13. Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs Can Watch and Think Simultaneously
  14. BTZSC: A Benchmark for Zero-Shot Text Classification Across Cross-Encoders, Embedding Models, Rerankers and LLMs
  15. Sparking Scientific Creativity via LLM-Driven Interdisciplinary Inspiration

📬 AI 日报自动抓取自 arXiv，每日早 8 点更新

💬 重点聚焦：大模型、Agent、多模态、机器人等方向

📊 统计：今日共收录 15 篇论文，其中大模型应用 15 项

Recent AI-based approaches to scientific discovery show promise for interdisciplinary research, but many prioritize rapidly designing experiments and solutions, bypassing the exploratory, collaborative reasoning processes that drive creative interdisciplinary bre…

🏢 行业快报

  • OpenAI 发布新模型更新: OpenAI 持续优化 GPT 系列模型，提升推理能力和多模态理解性能。 (OpenAI Blog)
  • Anthropic Claude 功能增强: Claude 系列模型新增长上下文支持和改进的代码能力。 (Anthropic)
  • Google DeepMind 研究进展: DeepMind 在多模态学习和机器人控制领域取得新的突破。 (Google DeepMind)

📖 全部参考链接

  2. OmniStream: Mastering Perception, Reconstruction and Action in Continuous Streams
  3. MobileKernelBench: Can LLMs Write Efficient Kernels for Mobile Devices?
  4. EgoIntent: An Egocentric Step-level Benchmark for Understanding What, Why, and Next
  5. HomeSafe-Bench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Unsafe Action Detection for Embodied Agents in Household Scenarios
  6. EndoCoT: Scaling Endogenous Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Diffusion Models
  7. SceneAssistant: A Visual Feedback Agent for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Generation
  8. HATS: Hardness-Aware Trajectory Synthesis for GUI Agents
  9. MM-CondChain: A Programmatically Verified Benchmark for Visually Grounded Deep Compositional Reasoning
  10. Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections
  11. XSkill: Continual Learning from Experience and Skills in Multimodal Agents
  12. CoMMET: To What Extent Can LLMs Perform Theory of Mind Tasks?
  13. Video Streaming Thinking: VideoLLMs Can Watch and Think Simultaneously
